title: gonolobus pallidus
intro: Gonolobus pallidus, also known as the pale gonzal, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gonolobus pallidus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
